headline: VICI Properties Broadens Experiential Portfolio With 2025 Deals And Cash Flows
summary: VICI Properties (NYSE:VICI) entered a $1.16b sale leaseback agreement with Golden Entertainment in 2025. The company formed new partnerships with Cain International and Eldridge Industries during 2025. These deals expand VICI Properties' exposure beyond its core gaming properties and broaden its partner base. VICI Properties, trading around $29.67, sits in a segment of the real estate market that many investors watch for income and long term asset exposure. The stock shows a 5.4% gain year...
